summary: Frontend-only testing of AI Carousel Builder at /dashboard/create. All UI elements render correctly, state management works, and data-testid coverage is complete. Page loads with preloaded 6-slide carousel as expected. LLM-related 500 errors are expected due to budget exceeded (not frontend bugs).

environment_issues.detail: 500 errors on AI endpoints - expected per test requirements

passed_tests: Page loads with preloaded 6-slide carousel (NOT empty)
Strength badge visible on active slide [data-testid=strength-badge] - shows 'Strong'
Next/prev arrows navigate slides correctly [data-testid=next-slide, prev-slide]
Platform button click changes active state
Intro style buttons only visible on slide 1 [data-testid=intro-standard/emoji/headshot/full-image]
Emoji picker appears when intro-emoji selected [data-testid=emoji-🚀 etc.]
All AI inline actions rendered [data-testid=ai-improve, ai-viral, ai-rewrite-hook, ai-simplify, ai-curiosity]
Stock grid with 12 items [data-testid=stock-0 through stock-11]
Clicking stock item applies to slide and changes layout to text-image
Switching palette changes slide preview background color
Power tab: flow-opt-btn, balance-btn, poll-btn present
Add slide button works [data-testid=add-slide-btn] - adds 7th slide
Edit title/body updates preview in real-time
Toggle Title off hides title in preview
Intro style NOT visible on slide 2+ (correctly hidden)
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented for comprehensive test coverage
State management works correctly - all UI interactions update preview in real-time
Preloaded carousel with 6 slides loads immediately as required
Graceful error handling for LLM failures (shows toast, doesn't break UI)
Responsive layout with proper sidebar, header, and main content areas
seed_data_creation: None needed - uses localStorage demo auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend UI elements for the AI Carousel Builder at /dashboard/create are working correctly. The page loads with a preloaded 6-slide carousel. All data-testid attributes are present and functional. LLM-dependent features (Generate, AI actions) return 500 due to budget exceeded - this is expected and handled gracefully with toast notifications. No frontend bugs found.
